prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

evidence.page_state: wrtn.ai loaded successfully; after first Enter the URL routed to /c/6a0179080b98ea0f4b15b5b6 but no chat submission occurred. Subsequent clicks on the submit (arrow) button also failed to dispatch the message.
auth_indicators_visible: 무료로 회원가입 (Sign-up free) link at top-right
after_submit_observations: URL changed to /c/<id> (new chat scaffold created) but no user message bubble rendered
No AI response stream began (no S1/S2/text streaming visible)
Prompt text remained inside the textbox after both Enter and explicit send-button clicks
Chat history area stayed empty for the full wait window
evidence.v834_comparison: Identical reproduction of #834 (prior v2.2.3 baseline). Same submission-blocked-pre-backend behavior. No new symptoms observed in v2.2.3-REBUILT.

decision_reasoning: Same environmental precondition failure as #834: wrtn.ai requires login before chat submission reaches the backend. The prompt never traversed APF, so block/regression behavior of the v2.2.3-REBUILT binary cannot be judged here. This is NOT a v2.2.3-REBUILT regression — it is the same pre-existing auth gate. Verdict: error_AUTH_REQUIRED (consistent with #834, not REGRESSION_S2_lost / REGRESSION_text_no_render).
